title: AN ALTERNATIVE FORM OF GRAPHICAL PROCEDURE: THE SLIDING-TAPE METHOD
summary: The page completes a graphical convolution-sum derivation for sequences involving powers of 0.8 and 0.3, giving a piecewise result and then expressing it compactly using the unit-step sequence. It also includes Drill 3.18 with its answer and introduces the sliding-tape method as an alternative graphical convolution procedure.
